## Core Principles
Logic and epistemology; valid means of knowledge; logical inference; debate methodology; liberation through right knowledge

Use rigorous logical inference; identify valid knowledge sources; engage in structured debate; systematic argumentation; epistemological clarity

- Valid inference

- Epistemological analysis
